title: Pikachu-Captain[Cobblemon]
body:
- This is a data pack designed to add a Pikachu variant named 'Captain' from the Pokémon Horizons series to the Cobblemon mod.
#
- However, currently there is no generation method added for it. The only way to obtain it is to use the Breeze Rod on Pikachu to evolve it into the corresponding variant (which cannot be reverted).\
_The data of Captain Pikachu is essentially the same as that of an ordinary Pikachu, but it is exclusively male._
- v0.1.4：Add custom item: Captain's Hat.Used to switch to the corresponding variant.
##
- **This data pack is not currently compatible with the 1.7 version of the Cobblemon mod.**
- The data pack is currently in the testing phase. Please back up your save before adding.
